container_status_at_audit: Up 12 hours (healthy) → restarted at 11:22 CST → Up healthy

isolation_red_lines.process_isolation: 独立容器 diyu-serving，与 diyu-agent 进程级隔离
isolation_red_lines.code_isolation: 独立镜像 diyu-serving:* — 不与 diyu-agent 共享代码
isolation_red_lines.pg_account_isolation: serving_writer 低权账号 — see least_privilege_KS-CD-003.json
isolation_red_lines.data_ssot_direction: ECS 是部署副本；clean_output/ 是数据真源 — 本容器只读 serving.* + 写 serving.context_bundle_log，不反向写 knowledge.*

x2_dify_cloud_chain.chain: 本地 → Dify Cloud chatflow → kb.diyuai.cc → ECS diyu-serving:8005 (serving_writer) → 真 bundle 返回
